name: @types/node
purpose: Node.js type declarations for Vite, Vitest, Playwright, and local script/config TypeScript typechecking.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata from `npm view @types/node version license repository.url --json` reported license `MIT` and repository `https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped.git`.
wellKnownEvidence: @types/node is the standard DefinitelyTyped package for Node.js type declarations and matches the local Node major version reported by `node --version`.
